case_title: GUALBERTO NIC CAMARA VS. MANUEL MONTALBAN

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAMARA, GUALBERTO NIC AS TO DEFENDANT MONTALBAN, MANUEL AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAMARA, GUALBERTO NIC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MONTALBAN, MANUEL AN INDIVIDUAL $22,337.39 PRINCIPAL, $1,150.55 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $23,857.94, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
